top_signals.title: Bank of England appoints Rhys Phillips as the new Chief Cashier
top_signals.summary: The Governor of the Bank of England, Andrew Bailey, has announced that Rhys Phillips will be the next Chief Cashier and Director of Notes. He will take up the role on 19 October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Sustainability Reporting Guidance 2026-27
top_signals.summary: Guidance on sustainability reporting requirements for central government annual reports and accounts, which may be used by other public sector bodies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chevron and Iraq seek to bypass Strait of Hormuz with Syria pipeline
top_signals.summary: Consortium backing project also includes Syrian-Qatari group and LA venture firm with ties to Trump ally Tom Barrack
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Here's what to expect when Netflix reports earnings after the bell
top_signals.summary: Investors will be looking for updates on Netflix's ad-supported business, engagement metrics and how the streaming giant continues to consider potential M&A.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: AI could transform ASEAN manufacturing, executives say
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mixed signals, research findings, and policy judgements − speech by Catherine L. Mann
top_signals.summary: Given at the Natixis CIB Private Debt Forum

top_signals.title: Iran Risks Overplaying Its Hand on Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Iran Risks Overplaying Its Hand on Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ex-motorway boss handed 12-year prison term over Genoa bridge disaster
top_signals.summary: Former chief executive of Autostrade per l’Italia convicted for his role in 2018 tragedy in north-west Italy

top_signals.title: TfL hackers ‘central’ to Scattered Spider group, says NCA
top_signals.summary: Two men each sentenced to five years and six months in prison for 2024 cyber attack

top_signals.title: Inflation Slowed to 3.5% in June, as Americans Got a Break From Gasoline Prices - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Inflation Slowed to 3.5% in June, as Americans Got a Break From Gasoline Prices  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
